title: Spyg-ChestShop
description: A lightweight Minecraft plugin for creating player-driven item shops with ease. Highly configurable
body:
## 🛒 SpygChestShop

Create powerful and lag-free chest shops with ease!  
SpygChestShop is a lightweight and efficient plugin that makes shop creation simple and intuitive, perfect for any Minecraft economy server!

---

### ✨ Features

🪶 **Lightweight and Efficient**  
Built for **speed**, **zero lag**, even on **larger servers**.

🛠️ **Easy Shop Creation**  
Just look at a chest and run a simple command to create **your shop**.

🔔 **Notifications**  
Get notified whenever someone buys from your **shop**.

⚔️ **Admin Commands**  
Easily manage shops and players using powerful **admin tools**.

### ⚙️ Highly Customizable

🛠️ **Tweak Everything to Your Liking**  
The plugin comes with a detailed and flexible **config** (`config.yml`) where you can customize nearly every aspect of the shop behavior from display messages to protection settings.  
Perfect for servers that want **full control** and a **personalized experience**!


---

### 🧾 Usage

- 🛒 Create a shop: `/scs create <shop-name>`
- 🧍 Players buy by right-clicking the chest and choosing the amount
- ➕ Add members: `/scs add <shop> <player>` to allow stock refills
- ❌ Break the chest to remove a shop
- 🛡️ Admin permissions:
  - Break any shop with `shift + right-left click` → `spygchestshop.admin.break`
  - Edit any shop with `shift + right-click` → `spygchestshop.admin.edit`
- 🔄 Reload config on the fly: `/scs reload`

---

### 🛠️ Installation Guide

1. 📥 Download `SpygChestShop.jar`
2. 📦 Use [Paper](https://papermc.io) 1.20.6+ (or fork)
3. 📁 Put the `.jar` file in your `plugins/` folder
4. 💵 Install [Vault](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/vault.34315/) and an economy plugin (like Essentials)
5. 🔁 Restart your server

---

### 📋 Requirements

- ☕ Java **21** or higher  
- 🧻 Paper **1.20.6+**  
- 💸 **Vault** + any economy plugin

<details>
<summary>📜 Commands & Permissions</summary>
  
- 🛒 **/spygchestshop create `<shop-name>`**  
  Create a shop while looking at a chest  
  🔑 Permission: `spygchestshop.use`

- ➕ **/spygchestshop add `<shop>` `<player>`**  
  Add a player to your shop  
  🔑 Permission: `spygchestshop.use`

- ➖ **/spygchestshop remove `<shop>` `<player>`**  
  Remove a player from your shop  
  🔑 Permission: `spygchestshop.use`

- 🏷️ **/spygchestshop rename `<shop>` `<new-name>`**  
  Rename an existing shop  
  🔑 Permission: `spygchestshop.use`

- 📄 **/spygchestshop list `[page]`**  
  List your shops  
  🔑 Permission: `spygchestshop.use`

- 📋 **/spygchestshop adminlist `<player>` `[page]`**  
  List all shops of a player  
  🔑 Permission: `spygchestshop.admin.list`

- 🔄 **/spygchestshop reload**  
  Reload the plugin configuration  
  🔑 Permission: `spygchestshop.admin.reload`

- 🧪 **/spygchestshop admin customer**  
  Toggle customer mode (for debugging)  
  🔑 Permission: `spygchestshop.admin.customermode`

</details>



<details>
<summary>Permissions</summary>
  
- **spygchestshop.max.`<group>`** - You can define max shop groups ing the config.yml
- **spygchestshop.admin.break** or **spygchestshop.admin** - Allows breaking of other player's shops (shift + left-click on shop)
- **spygchestshop.admin.edit** or **spygchestshop.admin** - Allows editing of other player's shops (shift + right-click on shop)

</details>

<summary>Videos</summary>
